{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321130439D04D07EC7048D1DB3487"}"},"total":920},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7555480150720201496","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"文笔不错，智商在线，感情描写也很细腻。关键一点，主角确实是成年人处事的风格。不像大多数重生文，就是靠着先知先觉，处事手法却稚嫩的像个中学生，"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1759150564,"group_id":"7544410373084957758","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+LkR+KIzqPd+xJjN1I1N4acYPwsbt27ZQ6hAPari5XQ","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"4391912283053259","user_name":"用户名80773581"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4391912283053259","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7544410373084957758","book_info":{"abstract":"【无系统，情商男主，大小修罗场，高甜无虐，糖色猛攻，大圆满】
重生了。
睁眼就在校花班长家，高考刚过三天。
撞见姜阿姨的那一刻他傻了。
阿姨温柔美丽，不但有大背景，还是管财务的好帮手。
并且对他这个准女婿万分照顾。
一起长大的秋姐姐霸道又娇媚，把他制得总处于下位。
校花班长喜欢贴贴，白助理有着大羞涩，又情绪敏感。
豪门千金高傲到了天上，在被他强行拦车后，却豪掷一千万当天使投资。
患有一级自闭症的女孩还患有陈越综合症，为了保护妹妹，孪生姐姐只好努力为陈越工作。
陈越时常自问，这要那要的，会不会不太好？
秋姐姐和姜阿姨说：不要沾花惹草就行。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d59158b6ab6b1d187aa1c6bddf7a52f2","author":"狐菌","author_id":"","book_id":"7544410373084957758","book_name":"她们太宠我！我只好成了首富","book_short_name":"爱就别停","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#300818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"13.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7544410425199182398","read_count":"130037","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1044529"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"483","tags":"都市日常,都市,重生,多女主","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/6935bfc0a03efd3fec9ebe33b07f6d6c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779253480&x-signature=QS7EoxzLbyCL8bKf2z5na1e5cMM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3268197939944622","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"56"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321130439D04D07EC7048D1DB3487"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":13,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":5323,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":10510,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":40848},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1759382890,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7559662927651963673","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，好看，好看！！！[赞][赞][赞][赞]早就该有这个觉悟了。这本小说不错有望冲击作者自己的巅峰作。开头更吸引人，一口气看到催更键，支持[赞][赞][赞]一招吃遍天不丢人，不要纠结这个。精准细分在一个小领域做到No1，没错呀。主食材就是（姐姐的爱），但是加入变换的辅料，调味，汤汁等不一样，关键是好吃，吃起来停不下那就没错[偷笑][偷笑][偷笑]。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1760131301,"group_id":"7544410373084957758","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更4000字，为爱发电，自己恋！哈哈哈哈","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzeeLzIwx6ve2kCPVtOFzb60YjMTtFfNQReGhaX+yJ+D","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2148e8a7eff44c3794da94741721a417~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776620092&x-signature=7ZcDnPSl%2F3GZo6xHgoIsomXpm%2BI%3D","user_id":"3421278731509662","user_name":"水月青荷"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3421278731509662","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":142,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"},{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7544410373084957758","book_info":{"abs
